overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a character running through an industrial coastal area toward a sandy beach. The scene transitions from a dirt path alongside warehouse buildings to an open beach with ocean views on a bright sunny day.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial dirt path with trees and warehouse

agents.ego_description: running along a dirt path between trees and approaching industrial warehouse buildings

entered.detail: tall green leafy tree with thick trunk
unpaved dirt trail with patches of grass
large industrial building with beige walls and dark roof
cluster of green leafy trees on hillside

segments.scene_description: The character runs along a dirt path surrounded by trees, approaching a large beige industrial warehouse. The path winds through moderate vegetation under a clear blue sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: warehouse perimeter path with ocean view ahead

events.description: path curves right around the warehouse corner revealing the ocean in the distance

agents.ego_description: running alongside the warehouse wall and turning toward the beach as the path curves

entered.detail: blue ocean water visible in the distance beyond the path

segments.scene_description: The character continues running alongside the warehouse wall as the path narrows and curves right. The ocean becomes visible in the distance as the trees fall behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal beach area with small utility shed

events.description: ground transitions from dirt path to sandy beach terrain

agents.ego_description: approaching and passing a small shed on the beach while heading toward the water

entered.detail: small corrugated metal shed with dark roof near the beach
white sandy beach area leading to the water

segments.scene_description: The character rounds the warehouse corner and transitions onto sandy beach terrain. A small metal shed sits near the shoreline as the ocean comes into full view.

scene_state.functional_zone: open sandy beach with ocean shoreline

events.description: camera pans right to reveal distant coastal buildings and pier structures

agents.ego_description: walking on the beach toward the water while surveying the coastline and distant structures

entered.detail: distant buildings including a red warehouse and pier structures along the coastline

segments.scene_description: The character walks across the open sandy beach toward the calm ocean water. The camera pans to reveal distant coastal buildings and a pier extending into the water under the bright sun.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a secluded industrial path that gradually opens into a wide, sun-drenched coastal beach. It begins with a character running along a dirt path through moderate vegetation and trees toward a large beige industrial warehouse under a clear blue sky. As the character continues alongside the warehouse wall, the path narrows and curves, causing the trees to fall away and revealing the first glimpses of the ocean in the distance. The scene then shifts as the character rounds the corner of the building and transitions from the dirt path onto sandy terrain, passing a small metal shed as the shoreline comes into full view. Finally, the camera pans across the open beach toward the calm water, revealing distant coastal buildings and a pier extending into the sea under the bright sun.
